fix_summary:
All 863 tests pass. Here's a summary of the complete fix:

## Root Cause

The formula engine parsed LibreOffice-style dot notation (`Sheet1.A1`) as valid cross-sheet references, but Excel returns `#NAME?` for this syntax. The previous fix attempt correctly emitted `#NAME?` for those refs, but error values then failed to propagate through several operators and functions.

## Changes Made (7 files)

**`formula/ast.go`** — Added `DotNotation bool` field to `CellRef` to track refs parsed via dot s...
